whatsNew: Added a compact 2 by 3 Apprentice+ tool grid at the bottom of Home.
Unlocked tools can now be opened directly from the Home screen.
Added working basic versions of MeasureMate, SafeMate, FixMate, MaterialMate and QuoteMate.
HintMate now opens a status page showing the learner’s current hint allowance.
MeasureMate includes area, volume and Pythagoras calculations.
QuoteMate can calculate a job total and print or save it as a PDF.
